description:
Offered: every semester
In this course, students begin to acquire the essential French that will allow them to function in the language in a variety of social and cultural contexts. By the end of the semester, students will be able to talk in French about themselves, their families, friends, studies, careers, and daily life in the present tense. Students will also be introduced to French and francophone cultures. Students engage in group activities to maximize their use of French.
Note: Students with two or more years of language instruction are not admitted without permission of the instructor.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): WS
